evidence_note: T-cell surface CD6; ChEMBL target CHEMBL3712853; itolizumab (Ph3, approved India psoriasis/GvHD) + oncolysin CD6; 9 trials. Established immune target.

4-1BB/CD137 costimulatory receptor; ChEMBL target CHEMBL3712857 with agonist antibodies urelumab (Ph2) & utomilumab (Ph3); 18+17 trials. Classic immuno-oncology target, absent from authors' table only.
Type-I IFN receptor; ChEMBL target CHEMBL1887; anifrolumab APPROVED (max_phase 4, Saphnelo/lupus), 50 trials. Established drug target.
E3 ubiquitin ligase, canonical TCR brake; ChEMBL target CHEMBL4879459; active CBL-B inhibitor IO programs (NX-1607 NCT05107674; NCT05662397). 233 immune pubs. Hot IO target.

Rho-family GTPase, established immune regulator (RAC2 immunodeficiency); ChEMBL target CHEMBL5581; 73 immune pubs; NCT05537610 (gene therapy for RAC2 deficiency). Well-characterized immune biology, not novel.
PTIP chromatin adaptor, known role in Ig class-switch recombination; 43 target-context pubs but NO ChEMBL target, NO drug program, NO trials. Known immune biology, undrugged.
tRNA isopentenyltransferase; 2 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, 0 drug trials (gene-intervention hits are spurious string matches). No target work.
U2 snRNP spliceosome protein; ChEMBL target entry CHEMBL5725125 but NO mechanisms/drugs; 2 immune pubs, 0 trials. No program.
Heterochromatin/silencing factor; 1 immune pub, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Essentially unstudied as an immune target.
Twinfilin actin-binding protein; 1 immune pub, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Unstudied as an immune target.
Chloride channel CLIC-like 1; 1 immune pub, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. No prior immune-target work.
Ubiquitin-related modifier / tRNA thiolation; 0 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, no mechanisms, 0 trials. No prior target work in T cells.
PHD-finger E3 ligase (HBO1 complex); 0 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Unstudied as a target.
Integrator complex subunit 6; ChEMBL target entry CHEMBL5724659 exists but NO mechanisms/drugs; 0 immune pubs, 0 trials. Registered protein, no program.
TatD DNase domain protein; 0 immune pubs, no ChEMBL target, 0 trials. Essentially uncharacterized as a target.
